enum_values.name: POSITION_BY_COORDINATES
enum_values.summary: The position given by the coordinates X, Y and Z.

enum_values.name: POSITION_BY_COORDINATES_MINUS
enum_values.summary: The position given by the coordinates X, Y and Z (minus side).

enum_values.name: POSITION_BY_COORDINATES_PLUS
enum_values.summary: The position given by the coordinates X, Y and Z (plus side).

enum_values.name: POSITION_MAX_NO_COORDINATES
enum_values.summary: No position specified, gets the maximum.

enum_values.name: POSITION_MIN_NO_COORDINATES
enum_values.summary: No position specified, gets the minimum.
